questionHtml: Suggest one reason why people in Victoria show such a large seasonal change in vitamin D levels.
markschemeHtml:
less sun in winter than in summer
OR
colder in winter so cover up/indoors more
OR
skin has more exposure to sun in summer ✔

Accept other valid suggestions.

Accept vice versa.

meta.title: Suggest one reason why people in Victoria show such a large seasonal change in vitamin D levels.
